_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater on every miner startup. To add a new platform: add an entry under `platforms`. To force-upgrade across a fork boundary: set `min_required_sha256` on the relevant platform entry. v1 single-binary schema (top-level sha256+url) is still recognized by the updater as legacy (treated as x86_64-linux); the v2 platforms-dict schema below is preferred and supports any platform key the wrapper can detect.
notes: v0.4.13 - all CUDA-Linux platforms now point at btx-prebuilds-v0.32.8. BTX v0.32.8 ships recovery-exit fee-replacement, mempool/reorg hardening, mining health RPC, and CPU nonce-seed pipeline optimization (perf gain hardware-dependent; most visible on CPU-bound Blackwell/Grace rigs). Consensus rules unchanged from v0.32.5. PR58 (windowed SHA + factored compression) is upstreamed in v0.32.8 source; only patch 05 (cmake target) is still applied at build time. arm64-darwin entry unchanged (still on v0.32.2 pending an Apple Silicon rebuild from the v0.32.8 source tree). No wrapper code changes from v0.4.11; the v0.4.12 session_gen experiment was tested and did not deliver and was never published.

x86_64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.8 (PR58 upstreamed + CPU nonce-seed pipeline opt). CUDA 12.8, archs sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120. LTO enabled. Built on home-1070; KAT-verified bit-equivalent (matmul_digest at nonce 1 = ca43457e54ba7e7d5cd6dfbbf17583887ae78cb75391df4e2a0c1d941ff413d6) vs v0.32.5 production binary on the loose-target reference job.

aarch64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.8 (PR58 upstreamed + CPU nonce-seed pipeline opt). CUDA 13.0, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120;sm_121. Covers GB10/Spark + RTX Blackwell consumer. Requires CUDA 13.0+ runtime. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml on GitHub ubuntu-24.04-arm. KAT-equivalent to x86_64 build by construction (same source + same patches); not GPU-tested on aarch64 host because GitHub runners have no GPU.

aarch64-linux-cuda12.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda12. BTX v0.32.8 (PR58 upstreamed). CUDA 12.8 build, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (no sm_121 — use cuda13 build for GB10/Spark). Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml on GitHub ubuntu-24.04-arm.

arm64-darwin.notes: Apple Silicon Metal backend. CI verifies cpu_digest == metal_digest == reference_digest before publish. arm64-darwin entry still on btx-prebuilds-v0.32.2 pending an Apple Silicon rebuild from v0.32.8 source — defer to a future point release.
